title: Intriguing Fluffy Mexican Cobnuts Rajas Con Crema
description: A floral and fluffy Mexican dish featuring cobnuts, perfect for a date night, this sugar-free-friendly recipe is made in the form of rajas con crema and served in a corn husk wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roast the chopped cobnuts in the oven for 10 minutes, or until fragrant.
Saute the chopped onions and minced garlic in a pan until softened.
Add the bhuna sauce, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the roasted cobnuts to the pan and stir to coat with the sauce.
Warm the corn husks by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Fill each corn husk with the cobnut mixture and top with a dollop of sour cream.
Serve the rajas con crema immediately, garnished with additional chopped cobnuts if desired.
Return any leftover rajas con crema to the oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes, or until warmed through.
